metric_value: Retailers that integrate IT across five divisions will gain sustainable competitive advantage; those that don't will decline

metric_value: Walmart's integrated supply chain and IT systems enabled sustained dominance; became world's largest retailer through IT-driven efficiency
notes: Walmart's RFID-enabled supply chain and Retail Link system cited as industry benchmark

metric_value: Kmart failed to integrate IT systems; filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy in January 2002; unable to compete with Walmart
notes: IT fragmentation was contributing factor in Kmart's inability to compete on pricing and availability

metric_value: Sears Holdings filed Chapter 11 in October 2018; failure to execute digital integration was major factor
notes: Sears' inability to unify online and physical channels validated integration imperative prediction

metric_value: Amazon built the most integrated retail IT stack in history; achieved $638B net sales by 2024
notes: Amazon represents ultimate realization of retail IT integration imperative

metric_value: Internet will become a significant retail sales channel requiring integration with physical operations
